name: Silicon Laboratories Inc.
description: Silicon Laboratories Inc. is a leading fabless semiconductor company headquartered in Austin, Texas. Founded in 1996, the company specializes in providing mixed-signal, analog-intensive integrated circuits for a wide range of applications. Silicon Labs is widely recognized as a trusted partner for innovative solutions in the Internet of Things (IoT), industrial automation, smart home, and automotive markets. By focusing on high-performance, energy-efficient, and connected technologies, the company enables developers to create smarter, more connected products that power the modern digital infrastructure across the globe.
